issues.title: ChatClient calling stream() did not return a complete JSON
issues.body: **Bug description** ChatClient stream calling did not return a complete JSON sometime **Environment** Spring AI version 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT, Java version 17,Spring AI version 0.8.1 also have this bug

comments.body: Why was it closed? I've encountered this issue as well.

> Why was it closed? I've encountered this issue as well.
